last_cycle.reason: Fix TypeScript errors in Beads: (1) relativePath() call on line 154 missing second argument, (2) exec() calls on lines 157/161 using wrong signature - should be exec(command, cwd, options?), (3) Duplicate Bead export in beads/index.ts lines 31 and 75. All 79 tests pass so logic is correct, just fix the TypeScript errors.

next_cycle.title: Fix Beads System TypeScript errors
next_cycle.prompt:
Fix the TypeScript errors in packages/runtime/src/beads/:

1. bead-store.ts:154 - Add second argument to relativePath() call (needs base path)
2. bead-store.ts:157,161 - Fix exec() signature: use exec(command, cwd, options?) not exec(command, options?)
3. beads/index.ts:31,75 - Remove duplicate Bead export (export both as type and class causes conflict)

Run `npx tsc --noEmit` to verify TypeScript compiles without errors. All 79 existing tests must still pass.
next_cycle.verify_prompt:
1. Run `npx tsc --noEmit` in packages/runtime/ - confirm 0 errors
2. Run tests: npm run test --workspace=@rubberduck/runtime -- __tests__/beads/
3. All 79 tests still pass
4. Verify duplicate export conflict is resolved

message_to_user: Beads caught TypeScript errors (wrong function signatures, duplicate exports). Sending it back to fix.
